summary: Made two surgical seam edits: one to echo the Mercer handoff from the previous chapter at entry, and one to name Sunday explicitly so the next chapter's ordered rest lands more cleanly.
edits: Added a brief Mercer callback near the opening to carry forward the burnt-coffee, fluorescent-office transition from the prior chapter boundary.
Changed the closing reflection from relative time to explicit Sunday wording to tighten the handoff into Chapter 12.
